title: Oh the Places You'll Go
excerpt: It's no secret this girl loves to travel. Blessed to have parents who encouraged such exploration from the beginning. They saved their pennies so I could get on a plane ride to their homeland, India, when I was 4. And…
body:
It's no secret this girl loves to travel. Blessed to have parents who encouraged such exploration from the beginning. They saved their pennies so I could get on a plane ride to their homeland, India, when I was 4. And in between then and now I have made over a dozen trips internationally. There are plenty of places I'd like to see someday, so when the challenge at Two Peas to make a layout without any photos popped up, I made this.

copyright | Two Peas In A Bucket

It's a list of places I've never been but would love to visit. All of them happen to be off the mainland. There are plenty more places, but I could only fit these on the page using some of my favorite letter stickers. If you could go anywhere in the world, where would it be?
